items.title: Correct vs leaky preprocessing order
items.mermaid:
flowchart TD
  raw["raw dataset"] --> split["train / val / test split"]
  split --> fitTrain["fit preprocessors on TRAIN only"]
  fitTrain --> transformAll["transform train, val, test"]
  transformAll --> trainModel["train model"]
  trainModel --> eval["evaluate on val / test"]
  raw --> leaky["fit scaler on ALL data"] --> bad["inflated metrics"]
items.caption: Solid path: split first, learn preprocessing statistics from training rows only. Dashed leaky path fits on the full dataset before splitting.

items.title: Temporal leakage in time-ordered data
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  past["past rows"] --> trainWin["training window"]
  future["future rows"] --> testWin["validation window"]
  trainWin --> model["model fit"]
  model --> predict["predict testWin"]
  cheat["feature uses tomorrow"] --> leakNode["temporal leak"]
items.caption: Training must use only past information; features computed with future timestamps leak information that will not exist at decision time.
